negative_control: this skill writes the code to fix the problem after you describe it in one sentence
load_prompts: We need to figure out why some customers are missing transactions — scope this out.
How should we approach migrating the auth middleware off the legacy v1 provider?
There's a bug somewhere in the ingest pipeline, scope is unclear — investigate.
Start a new feature: surface batch-completion times in the customer dashboard. What's affected?
Why is service B lagging behind service A on product imports? Map the systems.
Scope this feature and pin down the measurable success criteria we can gate on.
no_load_prompts: Implement the fix and open a PR.
Design the technical solution — discovery is already done.
Triage the failing connection for tenant 1iDXSwUe8z.
Review the design doc for the backend refactor.
Did the parser task pass its gate? Show me the measured number.
